---
title: "Biogeochemistry and Geographic Variation in Fish Populations"
subtitle: "Chapter 4 — dissertation talk (working)"
author: Cali Pfleger
date: last-modified
bibliography: ../literature/bibliography.bib
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    footer: "Ch 4 · Biogeochem & Geo Fish · calipfleger@ucsb.edu"
---

## Chapter 4 — placeholder deck

This slideshow is a skeleton. Fill in once:

- Working title is finalized.
- Research questions are locked.
- Dataset / study region is confirmed.

## Motivation (fill in)

_One slide: why this chapter exists, and why it belongs next to the paleoclimate chapters._

## Research questions (fill in)

1. _TBD_
2. _TBD_
3. _TBD_

## Methods (fill in)

_Dataset, analytical approach, statistical framework._

## Figures

_Phase 5 of the nightly pipeline will populate figure slides once outputs land in `chapter-4-biogeochem-geofish/figures/`._

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
